description: Beginning of a query submitted to Maimonides, beginning by telling about a local man who is now living in another city (the rest is too fragmentary to understand). Dating ca. 1168–1204 CE, based on the years when Maimonides was active in Egypt. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: תחילת שאלה שהוגשה למיימוני, בדבר גבר מקומי הגר כעת בעיר אחרת. כ-1168-1204.
